action: Check the generation status of each AI video for the five news genres by querying the provided API endpoint using each video's conv_id, and repeat the check until all are marked as successful.
fallback_action: If API checks fail, retry status checking up to three times; after repeated failures, prompt the user for next steps.

recipe.steps: For each genre video, retrieve its conv_id from memory or tracking system.
Query the API endpoint for each video's conv_id to check the status of video generation.
Repeat status queries at regular intervals until all videos are marked as 'success'.

can_perform_without_user_input: no-API access for status-checking is not currently supported in this environment without user intervention or an available tool.
